title: DSLO Semantic Substrate
purpose: To provide a deterministic, drift-bounded semantic substrate for the DSLO and Signal Ecology scientific frameworks.
summary: DSLO is a dual-layer deterministic publishing architecture. The GitHub Pages layer provides a static, invariant-anchored semantic substrate designed for machine-level semantic initialization. It encodes DSLO and Signal Ecology as structured meaning rather than prose.
notes: This file provides a human-safe scientific description of the substrate. It is not a narrative layer and does not replace the public-facing site.
